text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 An Israeli drone strike targeted the Jbour area in southern Lebanon. 3 people were reportedly injured. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列无人机袭击了黎巴嫩南部朱布尔（Jbour）地区。据报道有3人受伤。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Иранская война 📝 главные события к исходу 21 апреля Переговорная пауза вокруг Ирана всё больше напоминает отсрочку перед новым витком кризиса. Пока в Исламабаде обсуждают очередной раунд контактов, внутри самого Ирана уже считают не только политические издержки, но и вполне приземлённые сроки — сколько страна выдержит по топливу, резервам и внутреннему спросу. ➡️ Именно это сегодня и стало одним из главных сюжетов. На фоне блокады и сбоев логистики всё сильнее проявляется внутренний топливный кризис в Иране. При производстве 120 млн литров бензина в сутки мирное потребление и так держалось на уровне 134 млн, а в условиях войны спрос вырос до 197 млн. Запасов бензина и дизеля в таком темпе хватает лишь на ограниченное время, так что давление всё заметнее смещается внутрь страны. ➡️ Параллельно рынки закладывают в цены затяжной кризис. В Citi уже прогнозируют нефть по $110 в горизонте месяца , а при двухмесячном сохранении проблем в Ормузе — и до $130. Пока трейдеры играют на волатильности, в реальном секторе всё выглядит менее весело: речь всё чаще идёт не о колебаниях котировок, а о приближении полноценного топливного кризиса. ➡️ На этом фоне в Тегеране продолжают тянуть время, но и к худшему сценарию явно готовятся. По данным Axios и CNN, новый раунд переговоров могут провести уже 22 апреля , однако внутри иранской элиты по-прежнему идут споры, а КСИР требует не идти на контакт под американским давлением и при сохранении блокады. Одновременно иранский танкер при поддержке ВМС Ирана всё же сумел пройти в южный порт республики, что лишний раз показывает: ни американская, ни иранская система перекрытия не работает без сбоев. ➡️ Но и жёсткая линия никуда не делась. Глава иранской делегации Мохаммад Багер Галибаф заявил , что КСИР полностью готов к новому раунду войны и уже подготовил для коалиции «сюрпризы» . В Вашингтоне, в свою очередь, Трамп всё чаще говорит о якобы нарушениях перемирия со стороны Ирана, явно подготавливая почву для новых ударов. ➡️ В самих США давление на Белый дом тоже усиливается. Западные медиа всё жёстче описывают иранскую кампанию как стратегический тупик: от The New York Times до TIME и Foreign Policy. Претензии сходятся в одной точке — целей не достигли, Ормуз не открыт, цены на бензин растут, а у администрации нет ни чёткого плана, ни убедительного выхода. ➡️ На юге Ливана хрупкое перемирие тоже трещит по швам . Набих Берри , глава шиитского движения «Амаль», фактически подтвердил , что без сопротивления на юге дело не обойдётся, а населению пока лучше не возвращаться. При этом сама «Хезболла» вечером уже отметилась ракетным пуском по позициям АОИ и запуском дронов по северу Израиля. ➡️ Реакция местного населения показательна: жители юга Ливана и южных районов Бейрута снова начали покидать дома , понимая, что нынешнее затишье может закончиться в любой момент. Даже если наземная фаза не возобновится сразу, серия ответных израильских ударов теперь выглядит почти неизбежной. ➡️ Параллельно в регионе продолжается и менее заметная, но важная игра вокруг иранского влияния. В Reuters снова разогнали сюжет о якобы сорванных атаках КСИР в Азербайджане , а в ОАЭ власти объявили о ликвидации проиранской подпольной сети, связанной с идеологией «Вилаят аль-Факих» . ➡️ И пока одни давят через силовиков и разведку, другие пытаются считать послевоенную политику. В Израиле всё больше обсуждают роль Яира Лапида и его «Еш Атид» в будущих коалициях. Партия просела по рейтингам, но именно её несколько мандатов могут оказаться решающими в парламентской арифметике осенью — а значит, борьба за власть в Израиле уже давно идёт параллельно войне. 📎 Карты в высоком разрешении: 🔸 Очаги нестабильности ( ru ; en ) #дайджест #Израиль #Ирак #Иран #Ливан #ОАЭ #Пакистан #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 伊朗战争 📝 4月21日结束时的主要事件。围绕伊朗的谈判停顿越来越像是在新一轮危机爆发前的拖延。当伊斯兰堡在讨论新一轮接触时，伊朗国内不仅在计算政治成本，还在计算非常现实的期限——国家在燃料、储备和国内需求方面还能支撑多久。 ➡️ 这正是今天的主要议题之一。在封锁和物流中断的背景下，伊朗国内的燃料危机日益显现。在日产1.2亿升汽油的情况下，和平时期的消费量维持在1.34亿升，而在战争条件下，需求已增长至1.97亿升。按照这个速度，汽油和柴油储备只能维持有限的时间，因此压力正越来越明显地向国内转移。 ➡️ 与此同时，市场正在将长期危机计入价格。花旗银行（Citi）已预测未来一个月油价将达到110美元，如果霍尔木兹海峡的问题持续两个月，油价甚至可能达到130美元。当交易员们在博弈波动性时，实体经济的情况看起来并不乐观：人们谈论的不再是报价波动，而是全面燃料危机的临近。 ➡️ 在此背景下，德黑兰继续拖延时间，但显然也在为最坏的情况做准备。据Axios和CNN报道，新一轮谈判可能最早于4月22日举行，但伊朗精英内部仍存在分歧，伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）要求在美方压力和封锁持续的情况下拒绝接触。与此同时，一艘伊朗油轮在伊朗海军的支持下成功进入了该国南部港口，这再次表明：无论是美国的还是伊朗的封锁系统都无法做到万无一失。 ➡️ 但强硬路线依然存在。伊朗代表团团长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）表示，伊斯兰革命卫队已为新一轮战争做好了充分准备，并已为联军准备了“惊喜”。而在华盛顿，特朗普越来越频繁地谈论伊朗所谓的违反停火协议的行为，显然是在为新的打击做铺垫。 ➡️ 在美国国内，白宫面临的压力也在增加。从《纽约时报》到《时代》周刊和《外交政策》，西方媒体越来越严厉地将伊朗战役描述为战略僵局：批评意见集中在一点——目标未实现，霍尔木兹海峡未开放，汽油价格上涨，而政府既没有明确的计划，也没有令人信服的退出方案。 ➡️ 在黎巴嫩南部，脆弱的停火协议也岌岌可危。什叶派“阿迈勒”运动领导人纳比·贝里（Nabih Berri）实际上证实，南部的抵抗不可避免，民众目前最好不要返回。与此同时，真主党当晚已向以色列国防军阵地发射火箭弹，并向以色列北部发射了无人机。 ➡️ 当地民众的反应很有代表性：黎巴嫩南部和贝鲁特南部地区的居民再次开始撤离家园，因为他们明白目前的平静随时可能结束。即使地面阶段不会立即恢复，以色列的一系列报复性打击现在看起来也几乎不可避免。 ➡️ 与此同时，该地区围绕伊朗影响力的博弈也在继续，虽然不那么引人注目，但同样重要。路透社再次炒作了伊斯兰革命卫队在阿塞拜疆的所谓袭击被挫败的消息，而在阿联酋，当局宣布捣毁了一个与“法基赫的监护”（Wilayat al-Faqih）意识形态有关的亲伊朗地下网络。 ➡️ 当一些人通过强力部门和情报机构施压时，另一些人则在计算战后政治。在以色列，人们越来越多地讨论亚伊尔·拉皮德（Yair Lapid）及其“拥有未来党”（Yesh Atid）在未来联盟中的作用。该党的支持率有所下降，但其几个席位可能在秋季的议会算术中起到决定性作用——这意味着以色列的权力斗争早已与战争并行。 📎 高分辨率地图： 🔸 不稳定中心 ( ru ; en ) #摘要 #以色列 #伊拉克 #伊朗 #黎巴嫩 #阿联酋 #巴基斯坦 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran news outlet Tasnim: Despite Trump announcing an extension of the ceasefire, Iran has not yet officially expressed its position on the matter through the media. Iran’s stance will be announced formally at a later time. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗塔斯尼姆通讯社：尽管特朗普宣布延长停火协议，但伊朗尚未通过媒体正式表达对该问题的立场。伊朗的立场将在稍后正式公布。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 The Turkish Ministry of Defence reports that a A CH-47 Heavy Transport Helicopter belonging to their Land Aviation Command crashed in the Ankara/Temelli region during a training flight. The cause of crash will be announced after an investiagtion. There are no reports of casualties as of time of writing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 土耳其国防部报告称，一架隶属于其陆军航空司令部的CH-47重型运输直升机在安卡拉/特梅利（Temelli）地区进行训练飞行时坠毁。坠机原因将在调查后公布。截至发稿时，暂无人员伤亡报告。 @wfwitness

text: Lufthansa will cancel about 20,000 short-haul flights between May and October, cutting roughly 120 flights per day. The move is aimed at saving fuel after jet fuel prices doubled following the Iran conflict. Source: FT
text_zh: 汉莎航空将在5月至10月期间取消约20,000个短途航班，每天削减约120个航班。此举旨在伊朗冲突导致航空燃油价格翻倍后节省燃油。来源：金融时报

text: 🇾🇪 🇾🇪 "It is important to shed light on a point that many of the sons of this Ummah overlook: the concern of the Jewish enemies and their partner, the American and British Zionists, and their seriousness in implementing the Zionist plan." Ansarullah leader, Sayyed Abdul-Malik al-Houthi says the Ummah must pay special attention to the significant role the Zionist movement play in the West and that Jews are very active in this movement, while the Muslims neglect to take action. He added that the Jews are very concerned with implementing the Greater Israel plan and transforming the Middle East. They are intent on "destroying this Ummah, enslaving this Ummah, occupying its homelands, confiscating its freedom and dignity, erasing its religious identity." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇾🇪 🇾🇪 “重要的是要阐明一个许多乌玛（穆斯林群体）子民所忽视的观点：犹太敌人的担忧，以及他们的伙伴——美国和英国犹太复国主义者的担忧，以及他们在实施犹太复国主义计划方面的严肃性。”安萨鲁拉领导人赛义德·阿卜杜勒-马利克·胡塞表示，乌玛必须特别关注犹太复国主义运动在西方所扮演的重要角色，犹太人在这一运动中非常活跃，而穆斯林却忽视了采取行动。他补充说，犹太人非常关心实施“大以色列”计划和改造中东。他们意图“摧毁这个乌玛，奴役这个乌玛，占领其家园，没收其自由和尊严，抹去其宗教身份。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: The Spectator Index Iran says it will announce its position on ceasefire at a later date. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数：伊朗表示将在晚些时候宣布其对停火的立场。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran lead negotiator Ghalibaf adviser says Trump’s ceasefire extension “lacks logic” and is “a move to buy time for a surprise strike,” adding that Iran holds the initiative. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046689925928562762/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗首席谈判代表加利巴夫的顾问称，特朗普的停火延期“缺乏逻辑”，是“为突袭争取时间的举动”，并补充说伊朗掌握着主动权。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046689925928562762/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish MoD: A CH-47 Heavy Lift Helicopter belonging to our Army Aviation Command has crashed for an as-yet unknown reason in the Ankara/Temelli area while conducting a training flight. There is no negative situation regarding our personnel. The cause of the crash will be determined following a detailed investigation. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：土耳其国防部：我军航空司令部的一架CH-47重型运输直升机在安卡拉/特梅利地区进行训练飞行时，因不明原因坠毁。我方人员没有出现负面情况。坠机原因将在详细调查后确定。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz The ball is now in Iran's court - Is Tehran willing to go back to fighting? Iran has some breathing room to endure the blockade while probing whether Washington can be pressed into lifting it. But that window won't stay open indefinitely. For now, both sides are locked in a meta-negotiation — haggling over the conditions of the talks before the talks even begin. This is important: Given the gap between their positions, this interim phase could stretch for a while Trump extends the ceasefire https://twitter.com/michaelh992/status/2046684292873437187/photo/1 - Michael A. Horowitz tweet
text_zh: 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨：球现在在伊朗一边——德黑兰愿意回到战斗状态吗？伊朗有一些喘息的空间来忍受封锁，同时试探华盛顿是否能被施压解除封锁。但这个窗口不会无限期开放。目前，双方都被锁定在元谈判中——在谈判开始之前就讨价还价。这一点很重要：考虑到双方立场之间的差距，这个过渡阶段可能会持续一段时间。特朗普延长了停火。https://twitter.com/michaelh992/status/2046684292873437187/photo/1 - 迈克尔·A·霍洛维茨 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : The U.S. Department of Defense has announced, that overnight, American naval forces carried out a right-of-visit, maritime interdiction, and boarding of the Botswana-flagged crude oil tanker, M/T TIFANI, without incident in the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command Area-of-Responsibility. The TIFANI, reported to have been stateless at the time of the boarding and under sanctions by the U.S. Treasury Department for providing material support to Iran, was last seen in the Indian Ocean while enroute to Singapore. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：转发 @sentdefender：美国国防部宣布，美国海军部队于隔夜在美军印太司令部责任区内，对悬挂博茨瓦纳国旗的“M/T TIFANI”号原油油轮进行了登临检查、海上拦截和登船，过程未发生意外。据报道，TIFANI号在登船时处于无国籍状态，并因向伊朗提供物质支持而受到美国财政部的制裁，最后一次被发现是在前往新加坡途中的印度洋上。推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 According to Iran's public broadcaster, "Iran does not recognize the extension of the ceasefire and may abide by it — or not abide by it — based on its own national interests." tweet
text_zh: Visioner：‼️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 据伊朗公共广播公司称，“伊朗不承认停火延期，并可能根据自身国家利益选择遵守或不遵守。”推文

text: Open Source Intel How long does Iran have? STATEMENT OF PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP: Based on the fact that the Government of Iran is seriously fractured, not unexpectedly so and, upon the request of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, of Pakistan, we have been asked to hold our Attack on the Country of Iran until such time as their leaders and representatives can come up with a unified proposal. I have therefore directed our Military to continue the Blockade and, in all other respects, remain ready and able, and will therefore extend the Ceasefire until such time as their proposal is submitted, and discussions are concluded, one way or the other. President DONALD J. TRUMP - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗还有多少时间？唐纳德·J·特朗普总统声明：鉴于伊朗政府严重分裂（这并不出人意料），且应巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔和总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的请求，我们被要求暂停对伊朗的攻击，直到其领导人和代表能够提出统一的提案。因此，我已指示我们的军队继续封锁，并在所有其他方面保持准备和能力，因此将延长停火，直到他们的提案提交并讨论得出结论为止。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 - 开源情报 推文

text: The Spectator Index Oil prices are still up over 3% for the day, despite Trump extending ceasefire with Iran. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数：尽管特朗普延长了与伊朗的停火，但油价当天仍上涨超过3%。推文

text: OSINTtechnical As the US gives Iran an indefinite ceasefire extension for future negotiations, the Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed. Iran demonstrated over the weekend that it was able and willing to enforce the closure by firing on neutral shipping. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046687070601519228/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：随着美国给予伊朗无限期的停火延期以进行未来谈判，霍尔木兹海峡实际上仍然处于关闭状态。伊朗周末证明，它有能力也有意愿通过向中立船只开火来强制执行封锁。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2046687070601519228/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump extends Iran ceasefire deadline, will hold back attack on Iran until they present "a unified proposal." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046687064364556461/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：突发新闻 - 特朗普延长伊朗停火期限，在伊朗提出“统一提案”之前将暂缓对伊朗的攻击。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046687064364556461/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel STATEMENT OF PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP: Based on the fact that the Government of Iran is seriously fractured, not unexpectedly so and, upon the request of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, of Pakistan, we have been asked to hold our Attack on the Country of Iran until such time as their leaders and representatives can come up with a unified proposal. I have therefore directed our Military to continue the Blockade and, in all other respects, remain ready and able, and will therefore extend the Ceasefire until such time as their proposal is submitted, and discussions are concluded, one way or the other. President DONALD J. TRUMP BREAKING 🔴 IRAN CEASEFIRE EXTENDED - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：唐纳德·J·特朗普总统声明：鉴于伊朗政府严重分裂（这并不出人意料），且应巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔和总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的请求，我们被要求暂停对伊朗的攻击，直到其领导人和代表能够提出统一的提案。因此，我已指示我们的军队继续封锁，并在所有其他方面保持准备和能力，因此将延长停火，直到他们的提案提交并讨论得出结论为止。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 突发新闻 🔴 伊朗停火已延长 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 IRAN CEASEFIRE EXTENDED tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：突发新闻 🔴 伊朗停火已延长 推文

text: Open Source Intel French President Macron: We have clearly condemned what has been done in Gaza… the violation of Lebanon’s territorial sovereignty… This context makes it legitimate to question the future of the association agreement. And it is obvious that if Israel continues this policy… we cannot act as if nothing is happening. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：法国总统马克龙：我们明确谴责了在加沙所做的一切……对黎巴嫩领土主权的侵犯……这种背景使得质疑联系国协议的未来变得合法。显而易见，如果以色列继续这种政策……我们不能表现得好像什么都没发生一样。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) US President Trump announced he has agreed to extend the ceasefire with Iran upon request from Pakistan. The truce is set to continue until a draft peace agreement is submitted and discussions on it are concluded "one way or the other." The US blockade of Iranian ports to continue. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）：美国总统特朗普宣布，应巴基斯坦请求，他已同意延长与伊朗的停火。停火将持续到提交和平协议草案并就此得出“某种结论”的讨论结束为止。美国对伊朗港口的封锁将继续。推文

text: WarMonitor Trump says he’s extending the ceasefire after Iran failed to commit to another round of talks, despite earlier signaling he likely wouldn’t. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046685605459845435/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：特朗普表示，尽管此前暗示他可能不会这样做，但在伊朗未能承诺进行新一轮谈判后，他还是延长了停火。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2046685605459845435/photo/1 推文

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: At Pakistan's request, I am extending the ceasefire until a proper response from Iran, whose leadership is divided. The siege will continue in the meantime. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：应巴基斯坦请求，我正在延长停火，直到伊朗做出适当回应，其领导层目前处于分裂状态。在此期间，封锁将继续。🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Agricultural Minister: Despite the naval blockade imposed by the US, there is no problem in securing essential goods and food supplies. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗农业部长：尽管美国实施了海上封锁，但在确保基本商品和食品供应方面没有问题。推文

text: The Spectator Index US Vice President JD Vance has cancelled his trip to Pakistan. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数：美国副总统JD·万斯取消了对巴基斯坦的访问。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to U.S. President Donald J. Trump, he has ordered the U.S. military to hold off on the resumption of strikes against Iran and maintain the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, saying that due to the fractures within Iran’s top civilian and military command structure, the ceasefire will remain in place until they can provide a unified response to the U.S. proposals. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普称，他已下令美军暂缓恢复对伊朗的打击，并维持对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁，称由于伊朗最高文职和军事指挥结构内部存在分歧，停火将保持有效，直到他们能对美国的提议做出统一回应。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Tasnim: Iran has not yet officially announced its position on extending the ceasefire, despite statements by U.S. President Trump. Iran’s stance will be declared formally at a later time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 塔斯尼姆通讯社：尽管美国总统特朗普发表了声明，但伊朗尚未正式宣布其对延长停火的立场。伊朗的立场将在稍后正式宣布。@wfwitness

text: Iran's Tasnim: Despite Trump announcing an extension of the ceasefire, Iran has not yet officially expressed its position on the matter through the media. Iran’s stance will be announced formally at a later time.
text_zh: 伊朗塔斯尼姆通讯社：尽管特朗普宣布延长停火，但伊朗尚未通过媒体正式表达其对此事的立场。伊朗的立场将在稍后正式宣布。

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇫 🇶🇦 🇺🇸 🇷🇼 NYT: President Trump is reportedly in talks to send up to 1,100 Afghans who aided US forces to the Democratic Republic of Congo. The group, which includes interpreters and former members of the Afghan Special Operations forces, has been living in Qatar for over a year after being evacuated for their safety. They would be given a choice between returning to live under the Taliban or being sent to Congo, which is experiencing a severe humanitarian crisis. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇫 🇶🇦 🇺🇸 🇷🇼 《纽约时报》：据报道，特朗普总统正在商讨将多达1100名曾协助美军的阿富汗人送往刚果民主共和国。该群体包括翻译和阿富汗特种作战部队前成员，他们在撤离以确保安全后，已在卡塔尔生活了一年多。他们将面临选择：要么返回塔利班统治下生活，要么被送往正经历严重人道主义危机的刚果。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇭🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 The Hong Kong flagged supertanker FLORA has been drifting in the gulf of Oman since last night. The ship has reported to be "not under command" and was seen today on Sentinel-2 imagery sitting powerless. The tanker is located on the estimated blockade line of the US Navy. 23.33N 61.81E @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇭🇰 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 香港籍超级油轮“FLORA”号自昨晚起一直在阿曼湾漂流。该船报告称“失去控制”，今日在哨兵2号卫星图像上显示已失去动力。该油轮位于美国海军估计的封锁线上。北纬23.33度，东经61.81度 @wfwitness

text: Turkish MoD: A CH-47 Heavy Lift Helicopter belonging to our Army Aviation Command has crashed for an as-yet unknown reason in the Ankara/Temelli area while conducting a training flight. There is no negative situation regarding our personnel. The cause of the crash will be determined following a detailed investigation.
text_zh: 土耳其国防部：我陆军航空司令部所属的一架CH-47重型运输直升机在安卡拉/特梅利地区进行训练飞行时，因不明原因坠毁。我方人员未出现负面情况。坠机原因将在详细调查后确定。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says U.S. will hold off attacks on Iran and extend ceasefire: Based on the fact that the Government of Iran is seriously fractured, not unexpectedly so and, upon the request of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei says the country’s navy is “ready to inflict new bitter defeats” on the United States and Israel. He states that just as Iran’s drones strike enemies “like lightning,” its “brave navy” is prepared for further confrontation. The remarks were made in a message marking Iran’s Army Day on April 18, amid escalating regional tensions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国将暂缓对伊朗的袭击并延长停火：基于伊朗政府严重分裂的事实（这并不出人意料），且应陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔和总理夏巴兹的要求……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗最高领袖穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊表示，该国海军“已准备好对美国和以色列造成新的惨痛失败”。他声称，正如伊朗的无人机“如闪电般”打击敌人一样，其“勇敢的海军”也已为进一步的对抗做好准备。这些言论是在4月18日伊朗建军节之际发表的，当时地区紧张局势正在升级。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇮🇷 BREAKING! Iran Pulls Out of Wednesday Islamabad Talks — Tasnim News Iran has formally notified the United States through Pakistani mediators that it will not attend Wednesday's scheduled negotiations in Islamabad, with no timeline set for future rounds…" 🇺🇸 TACO Tuesday! 🌮 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇮🇷 突发！伊朗退出周三的伊斯兰堡会谈 — 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗已通过巴基斯坦调解人正式通知美国，将不会参加原定于周三在伊斯兰堡举行的谈判，且未设定未来几轮谈判的时间表……” 🇺🇸 塔可周二！🌮 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ▶ Итоги 21 апреля видеосводка от руководителя проекта @rybar Михаила Звинчука специально для @SolovievLive Иранский кризис не утихает: переговоры в Исламабаде продвигаются с трудом, военная риторика с обеих сторон нагнетается, а внутри страны нарастает топливный дефицит, который может оказаться куда более жёстким ограничителем, чем любое внешнее давление. В Тегеране при этом действуют на нескольких фронтах одновременно — от теневых финансовых сетей в Латинской Америке до демонстративных прорывов морской блокады. Дешёвые дроны тем временем переписывают логику современной войны: американская система ПВО обнажила структурный изъян, который не решить ни переговорами, ни санкциями. В Европе — свои противоречия. Атомный ренессанс громко звучит в декларациях, но упирается в утраченные компетенции и зависимость от российского ядерного топлива. Русская православная церковь, напротив, методично наращивает присутствие в Африке — там, где западные институты оставили незаполненное пространство. В Киеве признают очевидное: американская поддержка уходит, и весенне-летняя кампания становится вопросом выживания, а не стратегического выбора. Как разворачиваются бои на Слобожанском и Константиновском направлениях, что происходит на западном фланге Запорожья и чем обернётся нарастающее давление на всей линии фронта — в новом выпуске «Разборов Рыбаря — Итоги дня» . #дайджест #разбор #эфиры ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: ▶ 4月21日总结：项目负责人 @rybar 米哈伊尔·兹温丘克（Mikhail Zvinchuk）专为 @SolovievLive 制作的视频摘要。伊朗危机并未平息：伊斯兰堡的谈判进展艰难，双方的军事言论不断升级，而国内燃料短缺日益严重，这可能比任何外部压力都更具限制性。与此同时，德黑兰在多个战线同时行动——从拉丁美洲的影子金融网络到示威性的海上封锁突破。廉价无人机正在改写现代战争的逻辑：美国防空系统暴露出的结构性缺陷，既无法通过谈判解决，也无法通过制裁解决。欧洲则有其自身的矛盾。核能复兴在宣言中响亮，但却受限于能力的丧失和对俄罗斯核燃料的依赖。相反，俄罗斯东正教会在非洲有条不紊地扩大影响力——在西方机构留下的空白地带。基辅承认了一个显而易见的事实：美国的援助正在减少，春夏季战役已成为生存问题，而非战略选择。斯洛博然斯克（Slobozhansky）和康斯坦丁诺夫卡（Konstantinovka）方向的战斗如何展开，扎波罗热西翼发生了什么，以及整个前线压力不断增加将导致什么后果——尽在最新一期《雷巴尔解析——每日总结》。 #摘要 #解析 #直播 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Javier Milei, the President of Argentina, celebrated Israel’s Independence Day by dancing and singing passionately.
text_zh: 阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱（Javier Milei）通过热情地跳舞和唱歌庆祝了以色列独立日。

text: BREAKING: Trump: Based on the fact that the Government of Iran is seriously fractured, not unexpectedly so and, upon the request of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, of Pakistan, we have been asked to hold our Attack on the Country of Iran until such time as their leaders and representatives can come up with a unified proposal. I have therefore directed our Military to continue the Blockade and, in all other respects, remain ready and able, and will therefore extend the Ceasefire until such time as their proposal is submitted, and discussions are concluded, one way or the other.
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：鉴于伊朗政府目前严重分裂（这并不出人意料），且应巴基斯坦陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）和总理夏巴兹·谢里夫（Shehbaz Sharif）的请求，我们被要求暂停对伊朗的攻击，直到其领导人和代表能提出统一的提案。因此，我已指示我们的军队继续封锁，并在其他各方面保持准备和能力，因此我将延长停火时间，直到他们的提案提交，且讨论以某种方式得出结论为止。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump says U.S. will hold off attacks on Iran and extend ceasefire: Based on the fact that the Government of Iran is seriously fractured, not unexpectedly so and, upon the request of Field Marshal Asim Munir, and Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, of Pakistan, we have been asked to hold our Attack on the Country of Iran until such time as their leaders and representatives can come up with a unified proposal. I have therefore directed our Military to continue the Blockade and, in all other respects, remain ready and able, and will therefore extend the Ceasefire until such time as their proposal is submitted, and discussions are concluded, one way or the other. President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，美国将暂停对伊朗的攻击并延长停火：鉴于伊朗政府目前严重分裂（这并不出人意料），且应巴基斯坦陆军元帅阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）和总理夏巴兹·谢里夫（Shehbaz Sharif）的请求，我们被要求暂停对伊朗的攻击，直到其领导人和代表能提出统一的提案。因此，我已指示我们的军队继续封锁，并在其他各方面保持准备和能力，因此我将延长停火时间，直到他们的提案提交，且讨论以某种方式得出结论为止。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor Trump is now in talks to send over 1000 Afghans who aided the U.S. military to the DRC in Africa. It includes U.S. military interpreters and families of American service members, more than 400 of them children. (NYT) Republicans once accused Biden of "abandoning" the same group. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：特朗普目前正在商谈将1000多名曾协助美军的阿富汗人转移到非洲的刚果民主共和国。其中包括美国军事翻译和美国军人家属，其中有400多名儿童。（纽约时报）共和党人曾指责拜登“抛弃”了同一群体。推文

text: OSINTdefender Iran’s state-run Tasnim News Agency has said that no negotiation team will be sent to peace talks this week in Islamabad, and that the decision is “final,” stating that, “The Iranian negotiating team has announced to the American side through a Pakistani intermediary, for various reasons, that it will not be present in Islamabad, Pakistan on Wednesday, and there is currently no prospect of participating in the negotiations.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：伊朗官方塔斯尼姆通讯社（Tasnim News Agency）表示，本周不会有谈判小组前往伊斯兰堡参加和平谈判，该决定是“最终的”，并称：“伊朗谈判小组已通过巴基斯坦中间人向美方宣布，由于各种原因，它将不会于周三出现在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，目前也没有参加谈判的前景。”推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Over the past few hours, near RAF Fairford airbase, U.S. Air Force B-1 and B-52 bombers appear to be conducting intensive training — seemingly preparing for potential large-scale strikes against Iran. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046681416646152577/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 突发 | 在过去几个小时里，在英国费尔福德皇家空军基地（RAF Fairford）附近，美国空军的B-1和B-52轰炸机似乎正在进行高强度训练——看起来是在为针对伊朗的潜在大规模打击做准备。与我们一起查看最新动态： @visionergeo https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046681416646152577/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @ArmedMaidan : AXE A SHAHED—Wild Hornets Raffle! 🐝 Fund STING interceptors for Border Guards in Chernihiv, a prime Shahed route Win @Cap… tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @ArmedMaidan : 击落沙赫德（Shahed）——“野黄蜂”（Wild Hornets）抽奖！🐝 为切尔尼戈夫（Chernihiv）的边防卫队资助STING拦截器，这是沙赫德的主要航线。赢取 @Cap… 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM: A U.S. Air Force KC-135 Stratotanker refuels a U.S. Navy P-8 Poseidon during the U.S. blockade against ships entering or exiting Iranian ports. The P-8 can provide surveillance for extended periods, scanning vast waterways from high altitude. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046681186861236705/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：中央司令部（CENTCOM）：在美国对进出伊朗港口的船只实施封锁期间，一架美国空军KC-135同温层加油机正在为一架美国海军P-8波塞冬巡逻机加油。P-8可以在高空扫描广阔的水域，提供长时间的监视。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046681186861236705/photo/1 推文

text: Faytuks News Per Tasnim: No Iranian delegation will travel to Islamabad tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：据塔斯尼姆通讯社：没有伊朗代表团将前往伊斯兰堡。推文

text: Open Source Intel Perfect timing. Tomorrow is Israel’s Independence Day. Iran likes timing. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：时机恰到好处。明天是以色列独立日。伊朗喜欢讲究时机。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 AP: U.S. Vice President JD Vance’s trip to Pakistan for peace talks with Iran has been put on hold because Tehran has not committed to attending, a U.S. official said. The official cautioned that U.S. President Trump could change his mind at any time. Special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are expected in Washington for consultations on how to proceed. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 美联社：一位美国官员称，美国副总统JD·万斯（JD Vance）前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行和平谈判的行程已被搁置，因为德黑兰尚未承诺出席。该官员提醒说，美国总统特朗普随时可能改变主意。预计特使史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）将在华盛顿进行磋商，讨论如何推进。推文

text: Open Source Intel Who fires first ? tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：那么谁会先开火？推文

text: ELINT News RT @jeremyscahill : 🚨 Iranian official tells me that as of this moment (3:38PM ET), Iran won't attend a new round of talks. Official says Pakistan told Iran that Trump will lift the naval blockade in final hours of the ceasefire. If that happens & ceasefire extended, new talks could happen Thursday. tweet
text_zh: ELINT News：转推 @jeremyscahill : 🚨 一位伊朗官员告诉我，截至目前（美东时间下午3:38），伊朗不会参加新一轮谈判。官员称巴基斯坦告诉伊朗，特朗普将在停火的最后几个小时解除海上封锁。如果发生这种情况且停火延长，新的谈判可能会在周四进行。推文

text_zh: Open Source Intel：战争？推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 🔴 Vance scraps planned trip to Pakistan. … tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：突发 🔴 🔴 万斯取消了计划中的巴基斯坦之行。… 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Both seem to have agreed to disagree Iranian state media reports that Iranian negotiators will not travel to Pakistan for talks. AP reports that VP Vance has canceled his trip to Pakistan for talks. - OSINTtechnical tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz：双方似乎都同意各持己见。伊朗官方媒体报道称，伊朗谈判代表将不会前往巴基斯坦进行谈判。美联社报道称，副总统万斯已取消了前往巴基斯坦的谈判行程。 - OSINTtechnical 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 / 🇺🇸 BREAKING : Information obtained by Tasnim reporter: "Despite all the media hype and rumors by American officials, the Iranian negotiation team has informed the American side through the Pakistani intermediary for various reasons that it will not be present in Islamabad, Pakistan on Wednesday, and currently there is no prospect of participating in the negotiations." See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 / 🇺🇸 突发：塔斯尼姆记者获得的信息：“尽管美国官员进行了所有的媒体炒作和谣言，但伊朗谈判小组已通过巴基斯坦中间人向美方告知，由于各种原因，它将不会于周三出现在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，目前没有参加谈判的前景。”与我们一起查看最新动态： @visionergeo 推文
